context: Name of the to be translated language
Status will be checked or unchecked
This is the name of the popup that appears when a player gets a notification for a game invite or achievement unlocked

source_string: We've detected that your system has a screen reader enabled and have automatically enabled Minecraft's screen reader.
translation: Detectemos que'l sistema tien un llector de pantalla activáu polo qu'activemos automáticamente'l de Minecraft.

source_string: Do you want to sign out and switch accounts?
translation: ¿Quies zarrar sesión y cambiar de cuenta?

source_string: Relieve a Blaze of its rod
translation: Rínca-y una vara a un espíritu llumiegu
Faite un meyor picu de fierro

source_string: Destroy a Ghast with a fireball
translation: Destrúi un ghast con una bola de fueu
Usa «@p» pa seleicionar al xugador más cercanu

source_string: Must be an opped player in creative mode
translation: Has ser operador nel mou creativu

source_string: Command blocks are not enabled on this server
translation: Los bloques de comandos nun tán activaos nesti sirvidor
Usa «@r» pa seleicionar un xugador al debalu
Usa «@s» pa seleicionar la entidá n'execución

source_string: Your worlds are not getting saved properly. They might not be here next time you play Minecraft. Go to your Apple TV settings and turn on iCloud to make sure all of your worlds get saved.
translation: Los mundos nun tán guardándose afayadizamente. Quiciabes la próxima vegada que xuegues a Minecraft yá nun tean equí. Vete a los axustes d'Apple TV y activa iCloud p'asegurate de que tolos mundos se guarden.

source_string: You do not have enough iCloud space free to save your worlds properly. They might not be here next time you play Minecraft. Free up space on your iCloud account to make sure all of your worlds get saved.
translation: Nun tienes abondu espaciu llibre n'iCloud pa guardar los mundos afayadizamente. Quiciabes la próxima vegada que xuegues a Minecraft yá nun tean equí. Llibera espaciu n'iCloud p'asegurate de que tolos mundos se guarden.

source_string: You need an internet connection to save your worlds properly. They might not be here next time you play Minecraft. Reconnect to the internet to make sure all of your worlds get saved.
translation: Precises una conexón a internet pa guardar los mundos afayadizamente. Quiciabes la próxima vegada que xuegues a Minecraft yá nun tean equí. Reconéutate a internet p'asegurate de que tolos mundos se guarden.

source_string: You need to be signed in to iCloud to play Minecraft. Go to your Apple TV settings and turn on iCloud.
translation: Precises aniciar sesión n'iCloud pa xugar a Minecraft. Vete a los axustes d'Apple TV y activa iCloud.

source_string: A new iCloud account has signed in. You will need to restart Minecraft to play.
translation: Anicióse sesión nuna cuenta nueva d'iCloud. Vas precisar reaniciar Minecraft pa xugar.

source_string: Note! When you sign the book, it will no longer be editable.
translation: ¡Nota! Cuando robles el llibru yá nun va poder editase.

source_string: Height limit for building is %s blocks
translation: La llende d'altor pa la construcción ye %s
Nun se pue unviar el mensaxe

source_string: Are you sure you want to open the following website?
translation: ¿De xuru que quies abrir el sitiu web de darréu?

source_string: Do you want to open this link or copy it to your clipboard?
translation: ¿Quies abrir esti enllaz o copialu al cartafueyu?

source_string: Never open links from people that you don't trust!
translation: ¡Nun abras los enllaces de xente na que nun t'enfotes!
El xugador %1$s nun tien el llogru %2$s

source_string: You have entered an invalid IP address or a player that is not online
translation: La direición IP nun ye válida o nun se conoz al xugador

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a maximum of %2$d
translation: La barra de xefe personalizada %s tien un máximu de %s

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has no players currently online
translation: Anguaño la barra de xefe personalizada %s nun tien xugadores en llinia

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a value of %2$d
translation: La barra de xefe personalizada %s tien el valor de %s

source_string: Could not de-op (permission level too high): %s
translation: Nun camudó nada. El xugador nun ye un operador
%s yá nun ye un operador del sirvidor
Afita'l mou de xuegu d'un xugador.
Afitóse'l mou de xuegu de %s a %s

context: Board a boat / get on a horse

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, %3$s, %4$s (%5 blocks away)
translation: The nearest %s is at %s (%s blocks away)

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, (y?), %3$s (%4 blocks away)
translation: La estructura %s más cercana ta en %s (a %s bloques de distancia)

source_string: Could not op (already op or higher): %s
translation: Nun camudó nada. El xugador yá ye un operador
Fízose a %s un operador del sirvidor
Nun pue agospiase la partida llocal

source_string: Function and script files have been reloaded.
There are no objectives on the scoreboard
There are no tracked players on the scoreboard
You are not in a team

context: 1: Team Name, 2: Team Display Name, 3: Number of Players

translation: Establecer el puntu de spawn en %s, %s, %s [%s] en %s pa %s
Nun pue invocase a la entidá

source_string: Target either already has the tag or has too many tags
translation: L'oxetivu yá tien la etiqueta o tien milenta

source_string: Target does not have this tag
translation: El destín nun tien esta etiqueta

source_string: Sends a private message to one or more players.
translation: Unvia un mensaxe priváu a unu o más xugadores.

source_string: Failed to connect to the server
It looks like you don't have any courses assigned.
translation: Paez que nun tienes nengún cursu asignáu.

source_string: You need to collect blocks to craft!
You need stone materials to craft!
You need stone materials to craft!
You need to collect blocks to craft!

translation: actuales y nun van poder desfacese.

source_string: Alternatively, here's some we made earlier!
translation: D'otramiente, ¡equí hai daqué que ficiéremos enantes!

source_string: Want to share your preset with someone? Use the below box!
translation: ¿Quies compartir el preaxuste con daquién? ¡Usa la caxa d'abaxo!

source_string: Your realm name cannot be blank.
translation: El nome del realm nun pue tar baleru.

source_string: Your realm name cannot be blank, and you must accept the terms of service to create a realm.
translation: El nome del realm nun pue tar baleru y has aceptar los términos del serviciu pa crealu.º

source_string: Must accept terms and conditions to create a realm.
translation: Has aceptar los términos y condiciones pa crear un realm.
Diendo en cata de los sirvidores...

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil
translation: Una xunca que cayía estartó a %1$s

source_string: %1$s walked into a cactus whilst trying to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s apaincó haza un cactus mentanto %2$s lu escorría

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling block
translation: Un bloque que cayía estartó a %1$s
%1$s morrió por una bola de fueu que-y aventó %2$s
%1$s morrió por una bola de fueu que-y aventó %2$s usando %3$s
%2$s mató a %1$s col usu de maxa
%1$s caminó sobre fueu mentanto lluchaba escontra %2$s

source_string: %1$s tried to swim in lava to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s tentó de nalar na llava p'afuxir de %2$s

source_string: %1$s was burnt to a crisp whilst fighting %2$s
translation: %1$s convirtióse en ceniza mentanto lluchaba escontra %2$s

source_string: %1$s was skewered by a falling stalactite
translation: %1$s foi espetáu por un estalactito que caió

source_string: %1$s was doomed to fall by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s taba condergáu a cayer por %2$s usando %3$s

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s
%1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s using %3$s
You cannot respawn in hardcore mode!
Are you sure you want to quit?
Are you sure you want to exit the game to the main menu?
translation: ¿De xuru que quies colar de la partida y volver al menú principal?

source_string: Are you sure you want to save and leave the game?
translation: ¿De xuru que quies guardar y colar de la partida?

source_string: This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: Esta demo va durar 5 díes de xuegu, ¡esfórciate!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: Pasesti'l quintu día, usa %s pa facer una semeya de la to creación.

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: Esta demo va durar 5 díes (al redor d'una hora y 40 minutos na vida real). ¡Comprueba los avances pa tener pistes y diviértite!

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
translation: Usa les tecles %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s y el mur pa movete pela redolada

source_string: The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: Escosó'l tiempu de la demo. ¡Compra'l xuegu pa siguir o entama un mundu nuevu!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: ¿De xuru que quies bloquiar la dificultá d'esti mundu? Esto va facer que la dificultá seya siempres %1$s y nun vas ser a camudala de nueves.
Bloquéu de la dificultá del mundu

source_string: You were kicked from the game
You were kicked from the game:

translation: La sesión nun ye válida. Prueba a reaniciar el xuegu y el llanzador

source_string: The authentication servers are currently down for maintenance.
translation: Los sirvidores d'autenticación nun tán disponibles. Volvi tentalo, por favor.

context: Label on the first tile button in the servers grid

source_string: Multiplayer is not available in this lesson.
translation: El multixugador nun ta disponible nesta lleición.
Vagoneta con un bloque de comandos
Introduz una IP o un dominiu

source_string: This server has already been added
Are you sure you want to remove this server?
translation: ¿De xuru que quies desaniciar esti sirvidor?

source_string: This version of Minecraft doesn't support this feature
translation: Esta versión de Minecraft nun sofita esta carauterística

source_string: Your game mode has been updated to %s
translation: El to mou de xuegu anovóse a %s

source_string: Do you want to exit Minecraft?
Update to the latest version to access all the new features, play with friends online, or see what's new in the Marketplace.
translation: Anueva a la última versión p'acceder a toles carauterístiques nueves, xugar colos collacios en llinia o ver lo nuevo de la tienda.

context: How To Play help text header. {MaxLength="80"}

source_string: Achievements are only available in worlds set to survival mode with cheats off. If you continue, no one will earn achievements while playing in this world ever again even if you switch back before playing.

source_string: When you see this icon, we are saving your game. Do not turn off your device while this icon is on screen.
translation: Cuando veas esti iconu ye que tamos guardando una partida. Nun apagues el preséu mentanto esti iconu tea na pantalla.

source_string: Thanks for testing Realms! The features are not final and you might run into bugs. Send us feedback! We're listening.
